stemHtml: Changes to a flight plan submitted for an IFR flight (or a controlled VFR flight) shall be reported as soon as practicable to the appropriate Air Traffic Service Unit. One example of a significant change that would need to be reported is if the...

options.a: total number of persons on board is incorrect at the time of departure.
options.b: average true airspeed at cruising level between reporting points varies by 2%.
options.c: time estimate for the next applicable reporting point changes by 2 min.
options.d: aircraft deviates more than 3 NM from the track.
